groupRequests.description: Customers requesting access to another customer group, with accept/decline actions.

pendingReviews.label: Pending reviews
pendingReviews.description: Product reviews awaiting approval, with approve/decline actions.

pendingReviews.error: The review could not be processed.
pendingReviews.deleteModalText: Declining deletes the review "{ title }" permanently. This cannot be undone.
pendingReviews.noAccess: You do not have permission to view reviews.
